ideation: This sequence depicts the classic "see-no-evil monkey" pose, focusing on the hand-over-eyes gesture.  The animation will emphasize the covering of the eyes and the overall sense of playful mischief. The robot's lack of fingers requires us to create a convincing approximation of the gesture using the available joints and wrist rotation.  We'll use a three-frame sequence to capture the key moments of the action. Frame 1 shows the start of the gesture, with the arms moving upward. Frame 2 shows the hands covering the eyes. Frame 3 shows a slight relaxation of the pose. The right arm will remain relatively neutral to provide balance.

frames.beat: arms start to cover the eyes
hands are firmly over the eyes, playful mischief
a slight peek, eyes still mostly covered
